User.title: User Profile
User.description: Stores user profiles with basic permissions metadata.

userId.description: Firebase Auth unique ID for the user.

role.description: Access control role of the user.

Project.title: IoT Generation Project
Project.description: Represents an IoT platform generation project with code, diagrams and schematics.

userId.description: Owner userId who created the project.

name.description: Human readable title of the project.

status.description: State transition tracker for the workspace generation.

rawInput.description: The user's raw natural language prompt input.

optimizedPrompt.description: AI-empowered structured optimized prompt that serves as the blueprint.

recommendedPlatform.description: Target MCU selected, e.g. ESP32, STM32.

recommendedDisplays.description: Target display layout, e.g. OLED 0.96 inch.

recommendedAlerts.description: Target acoustic/alarm module, e.g. Active Buzzer.

recommendedNetwork.description: Communicative protocol selected, e.g. Wi-Fi + MQTT.

diagramSvg.description: The custom vector schematic diagram outlining pin-pair connections.

codeFiles.description: Serialized JSON dictionary containing file paths and source contents.

logs.description: Serialized array of steps completed with timing records.

errorMessage.description: Error details if the pipeline execution fails.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when of last state mutation.
